---
title: "SimplyAnalytics"
page-layout: article
---

# SimplyAnalytics

## Description

Web-based mapping and data platform with census, consumer, market, and local demographic data. Supports geographic analysis, market research, and community studies.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences, GIS & Spatial Data
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Geospatial & Mapping Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Geospatial & Mapping Data, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb2326)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
